label: History Auto Recorder
description: Defines a single data series recorded in the History graph, including its worker class, sampling frequency, graph color, y-axis label, and value format string.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that samples the recorded value each tick. Must be a subclass of HistoryAutoRecorderWorker.

recordTicksFrequency.label: Record ticks frequency
recordTicksFrequency.description: How often (in ticks) the worker is called to sample a new data point. Default is 60000 (one in-game day).

graphColor.label: Graph color
graphColor.description: Color used to draw this series on the History graph. Accepts integer (0-255) or float (0-1) RGBA components.

graphLabelY.label: Graph label Y
graphLabelY.description: Optional label for the y-axis when this series is displayed alone. Supports translation.

valueFormat.label: Value format
valueFormat.description: Optional .NET format string applied to each sampled value before display. Examples: "{0}", "{0}%", "${0}".

basic-recorder.label: Basic recorder
basic-recorder.description: A basic history recorder with worker class, graph color, and value format.
